title: The Continuous Internal Evaluation Cycle for Human-Centred AI
description: A flowchart depicting the iterative, multi-stage process of continuously evaluating an AI system from within its own operational lifecycle, focusing on human-centric metrics and improvement.
elements: Define Human-Centric Metrics (Utility, Usability, Ethical Alignment)
Integrate Evaluation Tools (Monitoring, Logging, Feedback Loops)
relationships: Sequential flow connecting all elements in a circular loop, with 'Validate & Document Changes' feeding back into 'Deploy & Monitor AI System' to signify iteration.
